hero.headline: Your home, wherever you want it.
hero.subheadline: Apple Cabin is a prefabricated modular mini house with rounded design, full-height glass windows, built with sustainable materials and ready to be placed in your green space.

problemi.title: Building a home today is still too complicated.
problemi.description: Endless permits, ballooning costs, never-ending construction sites, and environmental impact — the dream of owning a home feels further away than ever.

items.title: Long, uncertain timelines
items.description: Traditional construction takes an average of 2-3 years including permits and build time.

items.title: Unpredictable costs
items.description: Between site surprises and material price hikes, the initial budget is often just an illusion.

items.title: Environmental impact
items.description: Concrete is responsible for 8% of global CO₂ emissions.

items.title: Complete rigidity
items.description: Once built, that house stays there forever. You can't move it, adapt it, or rethink it.

soluzione.title: There's a smarter way.
soluzione.description: Apple Cabin solves every problem of traditional construction with a modular, sustainable and transparent approach.

items.title: Delivery in 6-8 weeks
items.description: From order to turnkey delivery. Certain timelines, no surprises.

items.title: Fixed and transparent price
items.description: What you see is what you pay. No hidden costs, no surprises.

items.title: Sustainable materials
items.description: Certified wood, rock wool or EPS insulation, thermal break sliding windows. Sustainability is in the details.

items.title: Modular and transportable
items.description: Apple Cabin is assembled wherever you want and, if you change your mind, it moves with you.

prodotto.title: Apple Cabin. Designed down to the smallest detail.
prodotto.description: Every element of Apple Cabin has been designed to offer maximum living comfort in minimal space. White monoblock structure with rounded edges, full-height glass facade, warm and functional interiors.

ambientazioni.title: Where can an Apple Cabin live?
ambientazioni.description: Private garden, agricultural land, resort area, independent office space. Wherever there's a corner of nature, Apple Cabin fits without altering the landscape.

processo.title: From project to delivery.
processo.description: A clear and transparent journey in 4 steps.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: Tell us about your project. We help you choose the right configuration for your needs.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Our architects customize every detail, from layout to interiors and finishes.

steps.title: Production
steps.description: Your Apple Cabin is expertly built in our factory using certified materials.

steps.title: Installation
steps.description: Transport, assembly and turnkey delivery. In 6-8 weeks your home is ready.

processo.cta: Discover how it works in detail

sostenibilita.title: Built to last, designed for the planet.
sostenibilita.description: We only use selected materials for their low environmental impact and energy performance.

items.title: Thermal insulation
items.description: Rock wool 50/75/100 mm or EPS panels for natural comfort all year round.

items.title: Energy efficiency
items.description: Thermal break aluminum sliding windows and airtight structure to reduce consumption.

items.title: Recyclable materials
items.description: Over 85% of materials are recyclable at end of life.

items.title: Dry production
items.description: No concrete in the production phase: dry assembly with minimal impact.

items.q: Do I need permits to install an Apple Cabin?
items.a: It depends on the intended use and the municipality. In many cases, as it's a prefabricated structure on a base slab, it falls under free construction or simplified reporting. Our team guides you through every bureaucratic step.

items.q: How long does it take from order to delivery?
items.a: The complete process takes 6-8 weeks: from initial consultation to factory production to transport and installation.

items.q: Can the Apple Cabin be customized?
items.a: Absolutely. You can choose finishes, interior layouts, glass types, and aesthetic customizations. Every Apple Cabin is unique.
Yes, we work with financial partners to offer customized financing solutions. Contact us for a detailed quote.

items.q: Is Apple Cabin suitable for year-round residential use?
items.a: Yes, Apple Cabin is designed to be habitable all year round thanks to high-level thermal and acoustic insulation.

ctaFinale.title: Ready to live in an Apple Cabin?
ctaFinale.description: Tell us about your project. We'll respond within 24 hours with a personalized quote.
